guidance: No formal company FY27 guidance located; analyst consensus expects ~20-25% revenue growth.
Key watch item is margin sustainability (EBITDA ~12-15% expected) amid competitive EPC pricing.
insights: FY26 revenue Rs546cr up 34%; PAT Rs21.1cr up ~5.5%; EPS Rs13.88; final dividend recommended.
Ahmedabad-based solar EPC across rooftop, C&I and ground-mount; recent Rs5.44cr Rajkot open-access order.
Net margin compressed to ~3.9% from ~4.9% as revenue outpaced profit growth.
Growth driven by Gujarat C&I/open-access demand under state renewable policy 2024.
concall.orderExecution: Order book not publicly disclosed; small ground-mount/rooftop EPC orders typically execute within 6-12 months.
concall.source: Q4/FY26 audited results 25-May-2026 (results filing/press); univest.in, scanx.trade, screener.in. NOTE: latest concall transcript on screener is May-2025 (Q4 FY25); a formal Q4 FY26 analyst concall transcript could not be confirmed publicly.

notes: Registry-level identity only; a detail JSON has not been added yet (model + manual approach).
